textByHash.1dfc4bf32a0c540fd1f9ab58e7990c806c745967: Thanks. The Saviours of Kourend make their home in a place called the Warrens. You'll find it in the sewers beneath us.
textByHash.24f7e08fbe6a3c5abd5a5db4afb3bd10d70607dc: Well you should look in the sewers beneath us. There you'll find the Warrens, where the Saviours make their home.
textByHash.30efd76d088352ce474ee2b95bf357f7d1a213d4: No time to talk. I have things to attend to.
textByHash.5a24863fd840b4639b5b168e803f1408886be72d: Buy some? Cook some? Doesn't matter to me.
textByHash.79ff12d415e694b4585a84a86cae7bbf75035f51: Do you have my stew yet?
textByHash.81cc3075c34520630f6f27b88cac7993f122e3a3: It's been too long since I've eaten some proper food. All we get around here is fish. Bring me a nice stew and I'll help you out.
textByHash.9d5e028c5470fc962fa4feee98cecee0383db932: Yeah I can help you, but not for free.
textByHash.a35a692c35e108fdf62e59edf850735433806739: No stew, no information. Come back when you have some.
textByHash.cb3603af9d2ac10953e85cc92ca2c0878a9376ca: No information for you then. Come back if you change your mind.
